before:
def process_order(req)
  return :null_request if req.nil?
  return :empty_order if req.items.empty?
  customer = Customer.find_by(id: req.customer_id)
  return :customer_not_found unless customer
  total = req.items.sum { |i| i.price * i.qty }
  order = Order.new(customer: customer, total: total)
  return :save_failed unless order.save
  OrderMailer.notify(order).deliver_later
  :ok
end
after:
def process_order(req)
  return :null_request if req.nil?
  return :empty_order if req.items.empty?
  customer = find_customer(req.customer_id)
  return :customer_not_found unless customer
  order = build_order(customer, req.items)
  return :save_failed unless order.save
  notify_customer(order)
  :ok
end

private

def find_customer(id)
  Customer.find_by(id: id)
end

def build_order(customer, items)
  total = items.sum { |i| i.price * i.qty }
  Order.new(customer: customer, total: total)
end

def notify_customer(order)
  OrderMailer.notify(order).deliver_later
end
why_safe: Guard clauses, customer lookup, order construction, and notification extracted into private helpers; return values and execution order preserved.
